claim_gate.reason: The hierarchical operator family resolves the complete n=6 table, but stable-n spectral gaps, compressed matrix formulas, coherent gate complexity, and decoding remain unproved.

falsifiers_triggered: One pair Hamiltonian is insufficient in sectors with second-stage Kronecker multiplicity.
A complete finite S_6 Racah table is not evidence of inverse-polynomial gaps at growing n.
Dense joint diagonalization does not compile the basis into a uniform coherent circuit.
Recoupling coordinates alone do not recover the hidden involution.

operator_contract.first_stage_hamiltonian: sum rho(tau) tensor rho(c) over transpositions contained in oriented 3-cycles
operator_contract.joint_label: intermediate partition, first-stage eigenvalue, second-stage eigenvalue
operator_contract.not_reported_as: a stable-n gap theorem, uniform coherent circuit, or hidden-involution decoder
operator_contract.reported_object: complete signed S_6 left/right Racah controls for every final sector
operator_contract.second_stage_left_hamiltonian: sum rho(tau) tensor rho(tau) tensor rho(c) over the same support orbit
operator_contract.second_stage_right_hamiltonian: sum rho(c) tensor rho(tau) tensor rho(tau) over the same support orbit
operator_contract.source: three copies of V_(4,2) for S_6

summary: Resolved all 10 final S_6 sectors with a two-level bounded-support commutant hierarchy; the finite Racah table is complete, while stable-n gaps, a circuit, and a decoder remain open.
